creator: jpb@jimby.name
text:
(In reply to Jim B. from comment #4)

Differential https://reviews.freebsd.org/D49185
has been committed.

This includes a procedure for doc team members for notifying the community when a FreeBSD developer (or any team member) passes away.

Following this procedure,

Hans Petter Selasky is submitted as:
https://reviews.freebsd.org/D49215


I will follow-up with Mike Karels when I have more info.
